chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4000 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing: 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.08.2025. Mr. Dhani Bux Malik, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh ------------------------------------ I.O./SIP Sohail Ahmed of PS Gulshan-e-Iqbal has recorded the statement under Section 161 Cr.P.C of Mst. Aliya d/o Altaf Hussain in which she has confirmed that she has contracted the marriage with Petitioner No.2 Pir Bakhsh at her own free will without any compulsion. I.O. states that he will file his report in ‘C’ class before concerned magistrate. He shall do so within 03 days of the date of this order. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above manner alongwith pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
